title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
summary: Google Cloud Tech explains how to build AI-powered agents using the Agent Development Kit and Model Context Protocol to ground agents in enterprise data via Looker. The tutorial covers MCP configuration, the MCP Toolbox for Databases, tools.yaml setup, API credential management, and creating agents that translate prompts into data requests.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building AI-powered agents with the Agent Development Kit and the Model Context Protocol, grounding them in enterprise data through Looker. It covers the concrete setup steps: MCP configuration, the MCP Toolbox for Databases, the tools.yaml file, and API credential management. The result is an agent that translates natural-language prompts into data requests against Looker, which matters for connecting language models to governed enterprise data rather than relying on model knowledge alone.
